Industries

Built for the sectors that depend on packaging.

The same converting expertise, tuned to four very different worlds, from sterile medical disposables to food contact cups and shelf ready retail cartons.

Pharmaceutical

Pharmaceutical

We supply the barrier grade papers and aluminium foil laminates that protect medicines from moisture, light and air, from glassine sachets to 4 ply foil laminates used by leading pharma brands.

Glassine Paper4 Ply Paper3 Ply PaperFolding Box BoardNon Tearable Paper
Explore Pharmaceutical
Food & Beverage

Food & Beverage

Food contact safe cupstock, greaseproof and MG poster papers engineered for hot & cold beverages, bakery, dairy and ready to eat packaging.

Cupstock PaperGreaseproof PaperMG Poster PaperMG Kraft Paper3 Ply Paper
Explore Food & Beverage
FMCG & Retail

FMCG & Retail

High gloss, print ready chromo and poster papers plus folding box board for retail packaging that needs shelf appeal and structural strength.

Chromo PaperMG Poster PaperFolding Box BoardDuplex BoardMaplitho Paper
Explore FMCG & Retail
Medical & Surgical

Medical & Surgical

Steam sterilizable Bactite and grid lacquer papers with bacterial barrier and self sealing properties for medical gloves, syringes, catheters and surgical sutures.

Bactite PaperGrid Lacquer PaperNon Tearable Paper
Explore Medical & Surgical

We'll recommend the right substrate, coating and finish for your industry's demands.

KPK P Packaging

A three decade family business converting and distributing coated papers and flexible packaging for pharma, food and FMCG, in India and 20+ countries.
